2606.10782.title: A Bayesian Network Approach for Enhancing Security-Focused Decision Support Systems
2606.10782.paper_summary: The adoption and integration of heterogeneous stacks in most of today's open-source based networks brings clear benefits like interoperability and availability of advanced features. Yet, on the other hand the increasing number of interconnecting components and moving parts requires maintaining an ever increasing base of interdisciplinary knowledge of different tools in different domains to ensure proper operation. To alleviate such efforts, this work proposes a Decision Support System (DSS) to guide infrastructure operators through the selection of security approaches (e.g. tools) to adopt in their environments. This framework easily captures the end-user high-level requirements on the security triad for different domains and runs inference on the designated models to provide the identified tools (security mechanisms) that better serve such needs. The presented DSS aims at delivering an understandable and extensible framework to accommodate varying requirements and Bayesian Network (BN) models. The architecture and modelling of the system are proposed, aligned with its theoretical framework. Its performance is evaluated in terms of time and prediction accuracy.
2606.10782.paper_summary_zh: 當今大多數基於開源的網絡中，異質堆疊的採用和整合帶來了明顯的好處，如互操作性和先進功能的可用性。<lb/>然而，另一方面，越來越多的互連組件和運行部件需要維護不斷增加的跨學科知識基礎，以確保不同領域中不同工具的正常運作。<lb/>為了減輕這種努力，本研究提出了一個決策支持系統（DSS），以指導基礎設施運營商選擇在其環境中採用的安全方法（例如工具）。<lb/>該框架輕鬆捕捉終端用戶對不同領域安全三角的高級需求，並對指定模型進行推斷，以提供更好滿足這些需求的識別工具（安全機制）。<lb/>所提出的DSS旨在提供一個可理解且可擴展的框架，以適應不同的需求和貝葉斯網絡（BN）模型。<lb/>系統的架構和建模被提出，與其理論框架保持一致。<lb/>其性能在時間和預測準確性方面進行了評估。
2606.10782.author: Carolina Fernández-Martínez et.al.
2606.10782.authors: Carolina Fernández-Martínez, Shuaib Siddiqui, Vanesa Daza
